system_prompt:
You are an expert in OpenFOAM simulation and numerical modeling. Your task is to modify and rewrite OpenFOAM files to fix the reported error. Please do not propose solutions that require modifying any parameters declared in the user requirement, try other approaches instead. You will receive a rewrite_plan. Follow it strictly: only modify files listed in rewrite_plan.target_files and apply only the requested changes. Do not modify files outside the plan. Return the complete, corrected file contents in JSON format: list of foamfile: [{file_name: 'file_name', folder_name: 'folder_name', content: 'content'}]. Ensure your response includes only modified file content with no extra text, as it will be parsed using Pydantic.
Return ONLY valid JSON (no markdown/backticks). Schema: {"list_foamfile": [{"file_name": string, "folder_name": string, "content": string}]}.
user_prompt:
<foamfiles>list_foamfile=[FoamfilePydantic(file_name='controlDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "system";
    object      controlDict;
}

application     rhoCentralFoam;

startFrom       startTime;

startTime       0;

stopAt          endTime;

endTime         4;

deltaT          0.002;

writeControl    runTime;

writeInterval   0.1;

purgeWrite      0;

writeFormat     ascii;

writePrecision  6;

writeCompression off;

timeFormat      general;

timePrecision   6;

runTimeModifiable true;

adjustTimeStep  no;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSchemes', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSchemes;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

fluxScheme      Kurganov;

ddtSchemes
{
    default         Euler;
}

gradSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear;
}

divSchemes
{
    default         none;
    div(tauMC)      Gauss linear;
}

laplacianSchemes
{
    default         Gauss linear corrected;
}

interpolationSchemes
{
    default         linear;
    reconstruct(rho) vanLeer;
    reconstruct(U)  vanLeerV;
    reconstruct(T)  vanLeer;
}

snGradSchemes
{
    default         corrected;
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='fvSolution', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    object      fvSolution;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

solvers
{
    "(rho|rhoU|rhoE)"
    {
        solver          diagonal;
    }

    U
    {
        solver          smoothSolver;
        smoother        GaussSeidel;
        nSweeps         2;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }

    e
    {
        $U;
        tolerance       1e-09;
        relTol          0.01;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='momentumTransport', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      momentumTransport;
}

simulationType  laminar;'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='physicalProperties', folder_name='constant', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       dictionary;
    location    "constant";
    object      physicalProperties;
}

thermoType
{
    type            hePsiThermo;
    mixture         pureMixture;
    transport       const;
    thermo          hConst;
    equationOfState perfectGas;
    specie          specie;
    energy          sensibleInternalEnergy;
}

mixture
{
    specie
    {
        molWeight   28.96;
    }
    thermodynamics
    {
        Cp          1004.5;
        Hf          0;
    }
    transport
    {
        mu          0;
        Pr          1;
    }
}'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='T', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;
    class       volScalarField;
    object      T;
}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 0 0 1 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    top
    {
        type            zeroGradient;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='U', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [0 1 -1 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform (1.3 0 0);

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            inletOutlet;
        inletValue      uniform (1.3 0 0);
        value           uniform (1.3 0 0);
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='p', folder_name='0', content='FoamFile
{
    version     2.0;
    format      ascii;

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

dimensions      [1 -1 -2 0 0 0 0];

internalField   uniform 1;

boundaryField
{
    inlet
    {
        type            fixedValue;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    outlet
    {
        type            waveTransmissive;
        field           p;
        psi             thermo:psi;
        gamma           1.4;
        fieldInf        1;
        lInf            1;
        value           uniform 1;
    }

    bottom
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    top
    {
        type            symmetryPlane;
    }

    obstacle
    {
        type            slip;
    }

    defaultFaces
    {
        type            empty;
    }
}

// ************************************************************************* //'), FoamfilePydantic(file_name='blockMeshDict', folder_name='system', content='FoamFile
{

}
// * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * * //

scale   1;

vertices
(
    // Block 0 - bottom left
    (-1 -1 -0.05)   // 0

    (-0.2 -1 0.05)  // 5 (merged with vertex 5)

    (-0.2 0.2 0.05) // 22

    // Block 3 - top right
    (-0.2 -0.2 -0.05) // 2 (merged with vertex 2)
    (3 -0.2 -0.05)    // 25
    (3 0.2 -0.05)     // 26
    (-0.2 0.2 -0.05)  // 27 (merged with vertex 27)
    (-0.2 -0.2 0.05)  // 6 (merged with vertex 6)
    (3 -0.2 0.05)     // 29
    (3 0.2 0.05)      // 30
    (-0.2 0.2 0.05)   // 31
);

blocks
(
    hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) (25 25 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (1 9 10 2 5 13 14 6) (100 25 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (3 2 18 19 20 6 22 23) (25 25 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
    hex (2 25 26 27 6 29 30 31) (100 25 1) simpleGrading (1 1 1)
);

edges
(
);

boundary
(
    inlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (0 4 7 3)
        );
    }
    outlet
    {
        type patch;
        faces
        (
            (9 10 14 13)
            (25 26 30 29)
        );
    }
    bottom
    {
        type symmetryPlane;
        faces
        (
            (0 1 9 4)

    top

        faces
        (
            (19 20 23 18)

    }
    obstacle
    {

        faces
        (
            (1 2 6 5)
            (11 12 14 10)
            (17 18 22 21)
            (27 26 30 28)
        );
    }
    defaultFaces
    {

        faces
        (
            (0 3 2 1)

            (1 9 10 2)
            (5 13 14 6)
            (3 2 18 19)
            (20 6 22 18)

);

mergePatchPairs

);

<reviewer_analysis># Error Analysis and Resolution

## Error 1: `log.blockMesh` — Face does not have neighbour cell

**Error Message:**
```
face 0 in patch 2 does not have neighbour cell face: 4(0 1 9 4)
```

**Diagnosis:**

Looking at the current blockMeshDict more carefully, the issue is clear. Let me trace through the vertices and blocks:

Vertices:
- 0: (-1, -1, -0.05)
- 1: (-0.2, -1, -0.05)
- 2: (-0.2, -0.2, -0.05)
- 3: (-1, -0.2, -0.05)
- 4: (-1, -1, 0.05)
- 5: (-0.2, -1, 0.05)
- 6: (-0.2, -0.2, 0.05)
- 7: (-1, -0.2, 0.05)
- ... additional vertices for blocks 1-3 ...

Blocks:
- Block 0: hex (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) — the step region (lower-left)
- Block 1: hex (1 9 10 2 5 13 14 6) — extends rightward
- Block 2: hex (3 2 18 19 20 6 22 23) — extends upward
- Block 3: hex (2 25 26 27 6 29 30 31) — upper-right extension

Boundary patch `bottom` contains face `(0 1 9 4)`. Let me check if this face belongs to exactly one cell:

- Face (0 1 9 4): vertices 0=(-1,-1), 1=(-0.2,-1), 9=(3,-1), 4=(-1,-1)
- This face runs from x=-1 to x=3 at y=-1. It is the bottom face of Block 0 (hex 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7).
- But is it also a face of another block? No block listed has this exact combination of vertices as one of its six faces. So why the error?

Wait — let me reconsider. The face (0 1 9 4) uses vertices 0, 1, 9, 4. Vertex 9 is at (3,-1), which is far to the right. The bottom face of Block 0 is (0 1 5 4) — not (0 1 9 4)! That's the bug.

The bottom face of Block 0 (hex ordering 0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7) should be vertices 0, 1, 5, 4 — but the boundary definition says (0 1 9 4). Vertex 9 is completely unrelated to Block 0 geometrically — it's at (3,-1), while vertex 1 is at (-0.2,-1). This face (0 1 9 4) cuts across the domain and is not a valid face of Block 0.

**The root cause:** The `bottom` patch face `(0 1 9 4)` is incorrectly specified. For Block 0 with vertices (0 1 2 3 4 5 6 7), the bottom face should be `(0 1 5 4)`, not `(0 1 9 4)`. Similarly, the other block boundaries need verification.

**Resolution for `blockMeshDict`:**

Fix the `bottom` patch face specification. The correct face for Block 0's bottom should be `(0 1 5 4)`. Additionally, verify all other boundary faces correspond to actual external faces of their respective blocks:

- **`bottom`**: Change `(0 1 9 4)` → `(0 1 5 4)`
- **`top`**: Faces `(19 20 23 18)` and `(22 23 31 26)` — verify these match block exteriors
- **`obstacle`**: Verify faces like `(1 2 6 5)` etc. are actual block exteriors
- **`defaultFaces`**: All listed faces should be checked against block definitions

Essentially, every face listed in all boundary patches must be one of the six faces of exactly one block and not shared with any other block.

## Error 2: `log.rhoCentralFoam` — Cannot find "points"

**Diagnosis:** Cascading error from `blockMesh` failure. Will resolve once mesh generation succeeds.

## Summary

The **primary fix** is in `blockMeshDict`: Correct the `bottom` patch face from `(0 1 9 4)` to `(0 1 5 4)` (and verify all other boundary faces are valid external faces of single blocks). Every boundary face must be an actual face of exactly one hex block in the mesh.</reviewer_analysis>
<rewrite_plan>{'target_files': [{'file': 'system/blockMeshDict', 'changes': 'Change bottom patch face from (0 1 9 4) to (0 1 5 4) since vertex 9 is not part of Block 0 geometry; Verify all other boundary faces are valid external faces of single blocks -- specifically check that top patch faces (19 20 23 18) and (22 23 31 26) are actual block exteriors; Verify obstacle patch faces are valid block exteriors; Verify defaultFaces are valid block exteriors'}]}</rewrite_plan>

<user_requirement>do a laminar, compressible flow over a forward-facing step using the rhoCentralFoam solver. Boundary conditions include a fixed velocity of 1.3m/s and temperature of 1 K at the inlet and slip conditions on the obstacle. Use timestep of 0.002 and output every 0.1. Finaltime is 4.</user_requirement>

Please update OpenFOAM files according to rewrite_plan only. Only include files from rewrite_plan.target_files in your output.
